drl:
rule "R0"
no-loop
when
    T1($b0_0_0 : f1, $b0_0_1 : f0)
then
end
rule "R1"
when
    ( $p1_0 : T0(f1 == false, f0 <= 10) )
    or
    ( $p1_0 : T0(f0 >= -3.0, f1 == true, f1 not in (true, true, false)) )
then
    insertLogical(new T1($p1_0.getF0(), $p1_0.isF1()));
end
rule "R2"
when
    T0(f0 <= -1, $b2_0_0 : f0, $b2_0_1 : f0)
    exists T0(f0 == 2.0)
    T1(f1 == true, f1 != false || f0 == -2.0, $b2_2_0 : f1)
then

rule "R3"
when
    not T1(f1 != true)
then
    insertLogical(new T1(5.0, true));
end
rule "R4"
when
    $p4_0 : T0($b4_0_0 : f1, $b4_0_1 : f1, f1 == false)
then
    insertLogical(new T1($p4_0.getF0(), true));
    insertLogical(new T1($p4_0.getF0(), $p4_0.isF1()));
    modify($p4_0) { setF1(true) }
end
